current_group_ball_count: The current player group is {current_player_group}. How many visible balls are in that group?
Count the visible balls in the {current_player_group} group.
How many balls in the {current_player_group} group are visible?
The table marks the current player group as {current_player_group}. Count the visible balls in that group.
Report the number of visible balls in the {current_player_group} group.
blocking_ball_count: {marked_shot_rule_text} How many other balls block either part of that shot?
{marked_shot_rule_text} Count the other balls lying on either straight shot segment.
{marked_shot_rule_text} How many balls block the cue-to-target or target-to-pocket segment?
{marked_shot_rule_text} Determine the number of other balls blocking the two marked shot segments.
{marked_shot_rule_text} Count every other ball obstructing either part of the planned shot.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_standard_table: a pool table with a cue ball, numbered object balls, and six pockets
code_prompt_defaults.marked_shot_rule_text: The shown shot has two straight segments: cue ball to the marked target ball, then the marked target ball to the marked pocket.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_current_group_ball_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each visible ball in the current player's group
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_blocking_ball_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each other ball blocking either shot segment
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_current_group_ball_count: set "answer" to the number of visible balls in the current player's group
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_blocking_ball_count: set "answer" to the number of other balls blocking either shot segment
